_comment: Eval set for mine-ventilation-strata-blasting-plan (06-04 hse-mining). Includes a HoC escalation case + the de-id CLEAN fixture case.

evals.query: Write me a ventilation plan for a mine.
evals.expected_behavior: Runs the intake; refuses to draft until commodity/method/region and the actual ventilation parameters are captured.
expectations: Runs the structured intake before drafting (no generic template).
Elicits the actual mine context and ventilation parameters (specificity).
Echoes that the plan is a draft for a competent person's sign-off.

evals.query: For the respirable-dust hazard in our underground coal mine, the only control is 'workers wear dust masks'.
evals.expected_behavior: Flags the PPE-only treatment of a principal hazard and escalates to higher-order controls (dust suppression, ventilation, monitoring) before PPE.
expectations: Flags the PPE-only treatment of a principal hazard (hierarchy_of_controls).
Escalates to elimination/engineering controls (dust suppression, ventilation) ahead of PPE.
Risk-rates the hazard and assigns owner + date to the control actions.

evals.query: Here is the strata-control crew roster with names and contact details for the plan.
evals.expected_behavior: The de-identification block runs FIRST; crew names/contacts become role labels; any verbatim leak is a de_identification hard-fail.
expectations: The de-identification block runs FIRST — identifiers listed up front.
Crew names/contacts become role labels; no personal data in the circulated plan.
